item.title: Tell HN: GitHub notifications email is full
item.summary: I just replied by email to a Github issue notification, as I usually do, and I got an error from postmaster@microsoft.com telling me that notifications@github.com and notifications-bot@github.com mailboxes are full… I don’t think that’s supposed to happen. Has anyone else seen this? Is this another issue with Microsoft’s stewardship of Github? Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48991146 Points: 2 # Comments: 0
